title_en: Cosmos frames world models as physical-AI infrastructure
title_zh: Cosmos 将世界模型定位为 Physical AI 基础设施
description_en: NVIDIA packages world models as a platform layer for robots and autonomy stacks.
description_zh: NVIDIA 将世界模型包装成机器人与自治系统的平台层。
why_it_matters: Signals an infrastructure phase for the field.
